args.code: (() => { const avatar = document.querySelector('img[alt*="@"]'); const login = avatar ? avatar.getAttribute('alt') : null; const nav = document.querySelector('meta[name="user-login"]'); const userLogin = nav ? nav.getAttribute('content') : null; return {login: login, userLogin: userLogin, loggedIn: !!document.querySelector('a[href*="logout"]') || !!document.querySelector('form[action*="logout"]')}; })()
